departments.title: Department Management
departments.start_creating: Start by creating your first department.

employees.title: Employee Directory
employees.subtitle: Manage all employees across your organisation
employees.retirement_desc: You are about to remove {{name}} from the system. Their access will be suspended immediately.

alerts.supervisor_reporting_rule: Supervisors must report to a Manager or higher rank.
alerts.supervisor_rank_rule: Assignment failure: Supervisor must report to a Manager or higher rank.
alerts.matrix_manager_desc: A functional or project-based manager you report to, in addition to your primary manager.

employees.permanent_removal_desc: You are about to permanently purge "{{name}}" from the HRM database. This action is irreversible.

leave.title: Leave Management
leave.subtitle: Manage your leave requests, handovers, and team approvals
leave.allocation_tier: Based on your leave allowance of {{days}} days/year
leave.pending_relief_count: You have {{count}} pending handover request(s) waiting for your approval.
leave.no_vectors: No leave vectors detected in the current matrix.
leave.mission_placeholder: Provide details for your leave request...

alerts.delete_confirm: CRITICAL: Administrative Deletion. This will permanently remove the leave request and all associated handover records. Proceed?
alerts.handover_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this handover record from the permanent register?

performance.title: Performance
performance.subtitle: Track goals, targets, and team growth

onboarding.title: Onboarding Overview
onboarding.subtitle: Track and manage your professional journey
onboarding.description: Your professional roadmap for a successful start. Complete these tasks to align with organizational standards and team workflows.
onboarding.no_tasks_tip: You don't have any onboarding tasks pending at this time.

payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.subtitle: Manage salaries, pay cycles, and payslips
payroll.no_summary: No pay cycle data available yet
payroll.rationale_placeholder: Explain the reason for these changes...
payroll.registry_awaiting_tip: Please select a pay cycle to view payslip records.

appraisals.title: Performance History
appraisals.subtitle: Track your personal growth and historical appraisal cycles.
appraisals.no_active_desc: You are not currently part of an active appraisal cycle. You will be notified when one begins.
appraisals.no_active_admin_desc: Either no cycles have been initiated for your organization, or you are excluded from personal reviews (System Owner policy).

packet.title: Performance Evaluation
packet.subtitle: Comprehensive assessment of professional goals and competencies.
packet.summary_placeholder_self: Summarise your performance this period. What did you accomplish and where did you fall short?
packet.summary_placeholder_manager: Provide an objective summary of {{name}}'s performance.
packet.strengths_placeholder: What was done particularly well this period?
packet.improvements_placeholder: Where should focus be placed to improve?
packet.dev_plan_placeholder: Recommended actions, training, or goals for the next review period.
packet.institutional_desc: As an authorized institutional reviewer, please confirm the final results. Once signed off, this appraisal will be permanently added to the employee's career record.
packet.gap_desc: A variation of >15% exists between the self-appraisal and the manager's review. You may choose to accept these results or formally contest them.

goal_achievement.name: Goal Achievement
goal_achievement.desc: Consistently meets or exceeds assigned targets and KPIs within the given timeframe.

quality_of_work.name: Quality of Work
quality_of_work.desc: Produces accurate, thorough work that meets or exceeds quality standards.

productivity.name: Productivity & Efficiency
productivity.desc: Manages time and resources effectively; achieves high output without sacrificing quality.

reliability.name: Reliability
reliability.desc: Consistently delivers on promises and maintains quality across all tasks.

job_knowledge.name: Job Knowledge
job_knowledge.desc: Demonstrates deep understanding of job requirements and applies relevant expertise.

problem_solving.name: Problem Solving
problem_solving.desc: Identifies issues, analyses root causes, and implements practical solutions.

innovation.name: Innovation & Initiative
innovation.desc: Proactively seeks improvements and brings new ideas that add value to the team.

teamwork.name: Teamwork & Collaboration
teamwork.desc: Works effectively with others, shares knowledge, and contributes to a positive team environment.

communication.name: Communication
communication.desc: Communicates clearly and professionally, both verbally and in writing.

customer_focus.name: Customer / Stakeholder Focus
customer_focus.desc: Understands and prioritises the needs of internal or external customers.

ownership.name: Ownership & Accountability
ownership.desc: Takes full responsibility for work and outcomes; does not deflect blame.

adaptability.name: Adaptability
adaptability.desc: Adjusts effectively to changing priorities, conditions, or requirements.

development.name: Learning & Development
development.desc: Actively seeks opportunities to grow skills and knowledge relevant to the role.

punctuality.name: Punctuality
punctuality.desc: Respects official working hours and meets internal deadlines for meetings and submissions.

login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.forgot_help: Contact your HR Administrator to reset your password.

dashboard.gap_description: We've detected a gap between current performance and your Q2 targets.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.hazmat_desc: Safe Purge preserves MD/DEV accounts only.
settings.branding_description: Visual identity, logos, and theme presets.
settings.data_description: Export history, backups, and data privacy.
settings.org_notice_desc: Changes here affect public billing receipts and organization-wide headers. Please verify all details before saving.
settings.auto_termination_desc: Users will be automatically logged out after inactivity.
settings.data_purge_desc: Permanently wipe all transactional and staff data — targets, appraisals, leave requests, payroll, and non-admin employees. Your MD and DEV accounts will be strictly preserved for continued access.
settings.data_purge_warning: Use this once before going live.

data_management.title: Data Management
data_management.subtitle: Export, backups, and system reset
data_management.purge_desc: Delete all transactional data (goals, appraisals, leave, payslips) while preserving org structure. This is irreversible.
data_management.purge_confirm: WARNING: This will PERMANENTLY delete all transactional data. Type CONFIRM to proceed.
data_management.purge_success: Data reset successfully. System is production ready.
data_management.export_hint: Download data in CSV format for archival or migration.
